nasb.text: even all that the Lord has commanded you through Moses, from the day when the Lord gave commandment and onward throughout your generations,

esv.text: all that the Lord has commanded you by Moses, from the day that the Lord gave commandment, and onward throughout your generations,

cnv.text: 就是耶和華藉摩西吩咐你們的一切事，從耶和華吩咐的那一天起，直到你們的世世代代；

ccb.text: 就是吩咐你们从祂颁布之日起要世世代代遵守的命令，
